name: Envista Holdings Corp
business: Envista is a global dental products company offering a comprehensive portfolio of dental implants, orthodontics, digital imaging, consumables, and services. It sells to dental professionals (including orthodontists, periodontists, and general dentists), DSOs, dental laboratories, and distributors in over 130 countries. The company operates through two segments: Specialty Products & Technologies and Equipment & Consumables.

exposures.sentence: Our comprehensive portfolio, including dental implants and treatment options, orthodontics, and digital imaging technologies, covers a wide range of dentists' clinical needs for diagnosing, treating, and preventing dental conditions as well as improving the human smile.
With the complete DTX Studio platform, clinicians can manage the entire digital workflow from image acquisition and diagnosis to implant surgery and restoration planning within one connected system.
Our Diagnostic Solutions business is focused on dental imaging, X-ray, and intraoral scanner solutions used in dental offices, clinics and hospitals.

catalysts.event: Stock repurchase program authorized up to $250 million through December 31, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On February 5, 2025, our Board of Directors authorized a stock repurchase program, allowing us to purchase up to $250 million of our outstanding common stock through December 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Further investment in Specialty Products & Technologies segment in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have invested in our Specialty Products & Technologies segment, adding manufacturing capacity and personnel to these businesses, with plans for further investment in 2026.
